title: CYLINDER BLOCK - Assembly (Cont'd)

figures_detected.description: Oil seal housing diagram showing liquid gasket bead application positions A-A and B-B with dimensions 2.0-3.0 mm (0.079-0.118 in) at two locations
Rear plate and flywheel/drive plate assembly with special tool KV10105610
Engine front mounting bracket and air conditioning compressor bracket attachment

steps.text: When oil seal housing is installed, make sure new oil seal is fitted. Remove liquid gasket from retainer, including grooves and cylinder block. Apply a 2-3 mm dia. bead of liquid gasket without gaps to oil seal housing as indicated. Assemble retainer within 5 minutes of applying liquid gasket.
notes: After assembly wait at least 30 minutes before starting engine.

steps.text: Attach rear plate and flywheel (M/T), drive plate (CVT). For CVT rear plate, scrape off all traces of acrylic tape from cylinder block and clean mating surface. Remove backing paper from acrylic tape before fitting new rear plate. Oil bolt threads and flange prior to attaching. Tighten bolts diagonally.
notes: Oil bolt threads and flange prior to attaching.

specs.label: Tightening torque for flywheel and drive plate

items.label: Liquid gasket bead diameter
items.condition: Oil seal housing application points A-A and B-B

items.label: Tightening torque - oil seal housing retainer
Tightening torque - flywheel and drive plate
Tightening torque - engine front mounting bracket
Tightening torque - air conditioning compressor bracket

tools_referenced.name: Flywheel/drive plate holding tool
tools_referenced.usage: Holding flywheel or drive plate during bolt tightening

model_notes: Step 8 distinguishes between M/T (flywheel) and CVT (drive plate) variants. CVT rear plate requires additional surface preparation steps.
